_comment: Assumptions for the intrinsic-value computation (notebook 23__intrinsic_value). Three independently-tunable scenario profiles live under 'scenarios': bull / mid / bear. 'mid' is the conservative Buffett/Graham base case (it equals what used to be the single 'defaults' profile, so nothing changes for anyone reading the mid case). 'bull' and 'bear' are FULL profiles (not deltas off mid). All three are computed and stored side by side per (ticker, period_type, fiscal_year, method, scenario). 'overrides' lets you tweak parameters per ticker; each leaf may be a flat scalar (same value for all scenarios) OR an object {"bull": x, "mid": y, "bear": z} (per-scenario value). 'margin_of_safety' is scenario-independent (informational thresholds only). Editing this file does NOT require touching code.

_units.horizon_years: int (years of explicit growth in the DCF)
_units.owner_earnings_multi: ratio (multiple applied to Owner Earnings — 15x is the classic Buffett)
_units.min_margin_of_safety: decimal (threshold to flag a 'buy' — Graham used 0.33 = 33%)
_units._override_leaf: an override leaf is EITHER a flat scalar (all scenarios) OR {bull, mid, bear}. Any parameter that already varies across scenarios (growth_stage1, wacc, discount_rate, multiple, base_pe, growth_cap, magic_number) MUST use the {bull, mid, bear} form so the override does not collapse that ticker's scenario spread. Structural flags (skip, horizon_years) stay flat scalars.

graham._magic_number_doc: Graham original: √(22.5 × EPS × BVPS). El 22.5 = 15× max P/E × 1.5× max P/B según Graham.

graham_revised._growth_cap_doc: Cap del crecimiento a 15% para evitar valoraciones absurdas en empresas hyper-growth.

dcf._use_oe_doc: Si true, descuenta Owner Earnings en vez de FCF (sabor más buffettiano).

owner_earnings._method_doc: 'multiple' = OE × múltiplo. 'perpetuity' = OE / discount_rate (Gordon sin crecimiento).

margin_of_safety._doc: Scenario-independent. Informational only — the dashboard may colour rows by these thresholds.

overrides._doc: Each key is a ticker. List only the parameters that change vs the scenario profile; the rest is inherited. A leaf may be a flat scalar (all scenarios) or {bull, mid, bear}. Parameters that vary by scenario MUST use the {bull, mid, bear} form (see _units._override_leaf); structural flags (skip, horizon_years) stay flat scalars.

AAPL._note: Apple ya es maduro — crecimiento explícito más conservador, escalado por escenario.

TSLA._note: Hyper-growth, horizonte más corto porque la incertidumbre se dispara.

BRK.B._note: Holding diversificado — los modelos por flujos no aplican bien. Mejor confiar en Graham Number sobre book value.

JPM._note: Banco — Owner Earnings y FCF no aplican bien. Confiar en P/B y Graham.

sector_policy._doc: Skip por defecto de los flow-models (DCF + Owner Earnings) según sector GICS de config.tickers.sector. Energy/Financials/Real Estate saltan por defecto: activos cíclicos de commodity en agotamiento, balances de intermediación financiera, y depreciación contable que distorsiona el NI de los REITs (van por FFO). Un override per-ticker con dcf.skip / owner_earnings.skip = true|false GANA sobre el default de sector (re-activa o fuerza skip para un ticker concreto). Sector NULL/Unknown -> no skip.
